Video.summary: A West Point graduate has trouble adjusting to an Army unit in the West.
Video.title: Lieutenant Bungle

Video.summary: A mine cave-in alters a rivalry between two men over the affections of a woman.
Video.title: The Watch

Video.summary: A reporter probes reports that a general is selling guns to Natives in exchange for their property.
Video.title: The Truth Teller

Video.summary: An unarmed Navajo sets out to avenge the murder and robbery of a Native elder.
Video.title: Experiment in Fear

Video.summary: John Wesley Hardin's efforts to hide his past are threatened when an old gang member comes to town.
Video.title: Preacher with a Past

Video.summary: The story of Amadeo Giannini and the creation of the Bank of America.
Video.title: The Unshakable Man

Video.summary: A princess agrees to be treated by a medical pioneer who uses a new method: blood transfusion.
Video.title: Bloodline

Video.summary: Plagued by gold thefts, Denver bankers set up their own mint in the bank basement.
Video.title: The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.

Image.alt: The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.

Video.summary: The man Kit Carson saved from death in the desert turns out to be his wife's ex-fiance.
Video.title: Stubborn Mule Hill

Video.summary: Suspicious townspeople are drawn toward two brothers who spend their nights digging at a grave.
Video.title: Shadow of Violence

Video.summary: An attorney takes the case of a famed gunman who is charged with murder.
Video.title: Diamond Field Jack

Video.summary: Peaceful Jack Slade changes into a vengeful gunman after he's attacked by a thief.
Video.title: The Man Who Died Twice

Video.summary: Hunting a large, mysterious creature.
Video.title: The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek

Image.alt: The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek

Video.summary: Partners in a mule team freighting business try to win the affections of a widow.
Video.title: Graydon's Charge

Video.summary: In 1862 Utah, the employees of a stagecoach depot encounter an orphaned Native boy.
Video.title: Little Cayuse

Video.summary: As survivors of the Donner Party recuperate, William Eddy grieves the loss of his wife and children.
Video.title: The Hastings Cut-off

Video.summary: Wyatt Earp's brother Virgil masquerades as a bandit to gain access to an outlaw hide-out.
Video.title: Trial at Belle's Springs

Video.summary: A down-and-out cowboy pines after a wealthy rancher's daughter.
Video.title: See the Elephant and Hear the Owl

Image.alt: See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl

Video.summary: The mayor of El Paso seeks cleaner water for the city and attempts financing by selling main street.
Video.title: The Streets of El Paso

Video.summary: A man's resemblance to a killer lands him in jail and facing a murder charge.
Video.title: Alias James Stuart

Video.summary: Officials rush to send word to a bride that an escaped criminal wants to stop her wedding.
Video.title: Fort Bowie: Urgent

Video.summary: Dr. Charles Edwards arrives in a rough frontier town to set up practice.
Video.title: Pioneer Doctor

Video.summary: An Indian girl must save a treaty.
Video.title: The Other White Man

Video.summary: A lawman must choose between love and duty in the midst of a missing persons case.
Video.title: There Was Another Dalton Brother

Video.summary: California's governor hires a photographer to help him win a bet about the way horses gallop.
Video.title: The $25,000 Wager

Video.summary: Two newspaper editors compete for the right to publish Denver's first newspaper.
Video.title: The Race at Cherry Creek

Video.summary: Native brothers must find a tribal renegade.
Video.title: Death in the Desert

Video.summary: A besieged banker devises a way to get gold.
Video.title: Raid on the San Francisco Mint

Image.alt: Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint

Video.summary: A poet forges a relationship with a street waif.
Video.title: Magic Locket

Video.summary: A minister's attempts to rebuild a church in Carson City are blocked by a saloon owner.
Video.title: Fighting Sky Pilot

Video.summary: Angered by increasing federal mining taxes, the citizens vote to secede from the U.S.
Video.title: Birthright

Video.summary: The appointed warden of a Nevada prison tries to apprehend three notorious escaped convicts.
Video.title: Temporary Warden

Video.summary: An Army officer helps a young man track down his sister, who was captured by Natives years before.
Video.title: The Lawless Have Laws

Video.summary: In a brawling frontier town, Sister Blandina tries to stop a hanging.
Video.title: The Fastest Nun in the West

Image.alt: The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West

Video.summary: Huldah Swanson is traveling west to meet her fiancé with $1000 sewn in her hat.
Video.title: The Hat That Huldah Wore

Video.summary: The mayor of Deadwood comes up with a manufactured hero to lure tourists into his dying town.
Video.title: The Resurrection of Deadwood Dick

Video.summary: Ignoring his brother's warnings, young Roy Bean gets involved in a rivalry over a pretty girl.
Video.title: Sense of Justice

Video.summary: While serving as scouts, Carson and Godey come across a man who lost everything in a Native raid.
Video.title: Samaritans, Mountain Style

Video.summary: A former cowhand shuns progress.
Video.title: A Wrangler's Last Ride

Video.summary: A woman's loyalties are tested when her lawman boyfriend must arrest her outlaw brother.
Video.title: The Day They Stole the Salamander

Image.alt: The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander

Video.summary: In the new state of New Mexico, a young woman decides to challenge the servitude system in court.
Video.title: Along Came Mariana

Video.summary: In Apache country, a missionary engages in a philosophic battle with an escaped murderer.
Video.title: A Man Called Abraham

Video.summary: The theft of turkeys being brought to market sets up a showdown between lawlessness and justice.
Video.title: The Great Turkey War

Video.summary: A cowboy becomes an expert baker while competing for the daughter of a rancher.
Video.title: Crullers at Sundown!

Video.summary: Prospector Jim Otis is taken hostage by robbers after he stumbles onto their loot.
Video.title: Solid Foundation
